# Vercel Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **Official Vercel and Vercel Labs skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It provides the definitive protocols for high-performance Web Platforms and AI-native applications.

## 🛠️ Synced System Capabilities
The following skills are linked directly to the executable `.ai/skills` directory:

### AI & Intelligence
- **use-ai-sdk**: Core implementation protocols for the Vercel AI SDK.
- **add-provider-package**: Standardization for adding model providers.
- **update-provider-models**: Maintenance routines for latest LLM integrations.

### Architecture & Composition
- **composition-patterns**: Advanced Vercel Labs standards for modular layouts.
- **react-best-practices**: Vercel-specific performance optimizations for React.
- **major-version-mode**: Guided upgrade paths for Next.js and major dependencies.

### Deployment & CI/CD
- **deploy-to-vercel**: Executable deployment logic for Vercel environments.
- **adr-skill**: (Architectural Decision Records) Standardized documentation for platform choices.
- **capture-api-response-test-fixture**: Automated fixture generation for robust testing.

## 🛠️ Deployment Architecture
- **Edge Runtime**: Prioritized for middleware (locale detection, auth redirects) to minimize latency.
- **Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR)**: Configured for all content-heavy pages with on-demand revalidation.
- **Connection Pooling**: Mandatory PgBouncer/HTTP client usage for Vercel functions connecting to Postgres.

## ✅ Success Criteria
- [ ] `vercel.json` configured with security headers for all `/api/*` routes.
- [ ] Tier-based environment variables (Dev / Preview / Production).
- [ ] Zod-validated environment configurations via `lib/env.ts`.
- [ ] Menawide primary region set to `dub1` for regional calibration.
- [ ] Zero secret keys prefixed with `NEXT_PUBLIC_`.

## 📥 Execution Protocol
To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
